add-multi-line-text-watermark.title: Add Multi-Line Text Watermark Using FormattedText
add-multi-line-text-watermark.description: Shows how to build a FormattedText object with multiple lines using AddNewLineText and apply it as a header watermark on every page with PdfFileStamp.

rotate-text-stamp-45-degrees.title: Rotate Text Stamp 45 Degrees in PDF
rotate-text-stamp-45-degrees.description: Demonstrates creating a text stamp, setting its Rotation property to 45°, positioning it, and applying it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-pdf-page-stamp-as-background.title: Apply PDF Page Stamp as Background to All Pages
apply-pdf-page-stamp-as-background.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a page from another PDF as a background stamp to every page of a document.

stamp-pdf-with-template-on-page-three.title: Stamp PDF with Template on Specific Page
stamp-pdf-with-template-on-page-three.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to bind a page from an external template PDF as a stamp and apply it only to the third page of an existing PDF document.

add-lower-roman-page-numbers-to-odd-page.title: Add Lower Roman Page Numbers to Odd Pages
add-lower-roman-page-numbers-to-odd-page.description: Shows how to apply lower‑roman page number stamps to odd pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-and-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Image and Text Stamp to PDF
add-image-and-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a stamp that combines a logo image with custom formatted text and apply it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-header-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Header Stamp to All PDF Pages
add-header-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and add a centered header stamp containing a company name using Aspose.Pdf.

add-footer-date-stamp-to-last-page.title: Add Footer Date Stamp to Last PDF Page
add-footer-date-stamp-to-last-page.description: Shows how to create a text stamp with the current date and place it as a footer on the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-rotating-stamps-to-pdf-pages.title: Apply Rotating Stamps to Each PDF Page
apply-rotating-stamps-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to add a text stamp to every page of a PDF and set a different rotation angle for each stamp based on the page index.

add-background-image-watermark-to-specif.title: Add Background Image Watermark to Specific PDF Pages
add-background-image-watermark-to-specif.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image watermark as a background stamp to pages 2‑5 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

batch-multi-line-watermark-pdf.title: Batch Add Multi-Line Text Watermark to PDFs
batch-multi-line-watermark-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and apply the same multi-line text watermark to each document using Aspose.Pdf Facade classes.

apply-pdf-stamp-and-save-to-new-director.title: Apply PDF Stamp and Save to New Directory
apply-pdf-stamp-and-save-to-new-director.description: Demonstrates how to apply a stamp from another PDF to each document in a folder and save the stamped PDFs to a separate output directory while preserving the original file names.

overlay-disclaimer-pdf-first-page.title: Overlay Disclaimer PDF on First Page Using PdfFileStamp
overlay-disclaimer-pdf-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp and Stamp to overlay a single‑page disclaimer PDF onto the first page of each target PDF in a folder.

apply-translucent-image-watermark.title: Apply Translucent Image Watermark to PDF
apply-translucent-image-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to add a 50% opaque image stamp as a background watermark on all pages of a PDF using the PdfFileStamp facade.

apply-rotated-image-stamp-bottom-right.title: Apply Rotated Image Stamp to Bottom Right of PDF Pages
apply-rotated-image-stamp-bottom-right.description: Demonstrates how to add a 30‑degree rotated image stamp to the bottom‑right corner of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-dynamic-page-number-stamp.title: Add Dynamic Page Number Stamp to PDF
add-dynamic-page-number-stamp.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp to add a text stamp that displays the current page number, converting a custom {page_number} placeholder to Aspose's required '#'.

add-multi-line-text-watermark-from-memor.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Watermark to PDF from Memory Stream
add-multi-line-text-watermark-from-memor.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF in memory, load it from a MemoryStream, and apply a multi‑line text watermark with custom font size and color using the PdfFileMend facade.

add-footer-stamp-with-bottom-margin.title: Add Footer Stamp with Bottom Margin to PDF
add-footer-stamp-with-bottom-margin.description: Demonstrates how to add a footer stamp to a PDF using PdfFileStamp and position it 10 points above the page bottom edge.

apply-text-stamp-to-even-pages.title: Apply Text Stamp to Even Pages in PDF
apply-text-stamp-to-even-pages.description: Shows how to add a text stamp only to even-numbered pages of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-qr-code-and-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add QR Code and Text Stamp to PDF
add-qr-code-and-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to stamp a PDF with a QR code image and a descriptive text label for product verification.

apply-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.title: Apply Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
apply-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to create a formatted text stamp and apply it only to pages 1, 5, and 10 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

overlay-image-stamp-on-pdf-pages.title: Overlay Image Stamp on PDF Pages
overlay-image-stamp-on-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp that overlays existing content on all pages of a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API and explicitly setting IsBackground to false.

add-transparent-confidential-text-stamp.title: Add Transparent Confidential Text Stamp to Selected PDF Pages
add-transparent-confidential-text-stamp.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent CONFIDENTIAL text stamp on specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

custom-font-text-stamp.title: Create a Branded Text Stamp with a Custom TrueType Font
custom-font-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to load a TrueType font from file and use it to create a text stamp for branding PDF pages with Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-number-stamp-leading-zeros.title: Add Page Number Stamp with Leading Zeros
add-page-number-stamp-leading-zeros.description: Demonstrates how to add Arabic numeral page numbers with leading zeros to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade.

batch-apply-rotated-pdf-stamp.title: Batch Apply Rotated PDF Stamp to Multiple PDFs
batch-apply-rotated-pdf-stamp.description: Shows how to enumerate PDF files on a network share and add a rotated page‑based stamp to each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

multi-line-watermark-different-fonts.title: Create Multi‑Line Watermark with Different Font Styles
multi-line-watermark-different-fonts.description: Shows how to add a three‑line watermark to a PDF, each line using its own font, size, color and opacity, by binding FormattedText to Stamp objects and applying them to all pages.

add-right-aligned-logo-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Right-Aligned Logo Stamp to PDF
add-right-aligned-logo-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to place an image stamp (logo) on every page of a PDF and align it to the right margin using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-png-background-stam.title: Add Semi-Transparent PNG Background Stamp to PDF
add-semi-transparent-png-background-stam.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent PNG image as a background stamp that covers the entire page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-multi-line-text-stamp-1-5-spacing.title: Apply Multi-Line Text Stamp with 1.5 Line Spacing
apply-multi-line-text-stamp-1-5-spacing.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted multi-line text watermark with custom line spacing, binding it to a stamp, and applying the stamp to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-creation-date-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Creation Date Stamp to PDF Pages
add-creation-date-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to read a PDF's creation date (or use the current date) and add it as a text stamp in the top‑left corner of every page using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-cover-page-background-pdf.title: Merge Cover Page as Background Using PdfFileStamp
merge-cover-page-background-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp and Stamp to add a cover page PDF as a background to all pages of another PDF, creating a merged document.

add-image-and-text-stamp-to-pdf__v2.title: Add Image and Text Stamp to PDF
add-image-and-text-stamp-to-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to place a company logo image and a bold "Confidential" text stamp on a PDF document.

apply-multi-line-watermark-custom-line-h.title: Apply Multi-Line Watermark with Custom Line Height
apply-multi-line-watermark-custom-line-h.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted text watermark with custom line spacing and applying it as a background stamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

rotate-pdf-stamp-90-degrees.title: Rotate PDF Stamp by 90 Degrees
rotate-pdf-stamp-90-degrees.description: Demonstrates creating a formatted text stamp, setting its Rotation to 90 degrees with PdfFileStamp, and applying it to all pages of a PDF.

add-footer-with-page-count.title: Add Footer with Page Count to PDF
add-footer-with-page-count.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade to add a footer containing the {page_count} placeholder to every page of a PDF document.

multi-page-pdf-stamp-from-multiple-pdfs.title: Create Multi‑Page PDF Stamp from Multiple PDFs
multi-page-pdf-stamp-from-multiple-pdfs.description: Combines several PDF files into a single temporary PDF and applies each page as a background stamp to the corresponding pages of a target PDF.

apply-custom-stamp-annotation.title: Apply Custom Stamp Annotation with Border to PDF
apply-custom-stamp-annotation.description: Demonstrates adding a yellow stamp annotation with a 3‑point border to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-add-rotated-image-stamp-to-first-p.title: Batch Add Rotated Image Stamp to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-rotated-image-stamp-to-first-p.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a directory and apply a rotated image stamp only to the first page of each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages Efficiently
apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp with a Stamp object to add a single image stamp to every page of a PDF in one operation.

add-file-name-header-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add File Name Header Stamp to PDF
add-file-name-header-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a header containing the {file_name} placeholder to every page of a PDF, then save the stamped document.

add-semi-transparent-background-text-sta.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Text Stamp
add-semi-transparent-background-text-sta.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a semi‑transparent background text stamp (e.g., CONFIDENTIAL) to all pages of a PDF while preserving readability.

add-multi-line-text-watermark__v2.title: Add Multi-Line Text Watermark with Varying Font Sizes
add-multi-line-text-watermark__v2.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a multi-line text watermark to all pages of a PDF, applying different font sizes for visual hierarchy.

apply-rotated-text-stamp-odd-pages.title: Apply Rotated Text Stamp to Odd Pages
apply-rotated-text-stamp-odd-pages.description: Shows how to add a 30-degree rotated text stamp to the left margin of every odd-numbered page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-dynamic-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Text Stamp to PDF
add-dynamic-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a text stamp with interpolated date and author information and applying it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-repeating-background-watermark-to-pd.title: Add Repeating Background Watermark to PDF Pages
add-repeating-background-watermark-to-pd.description: Demonstrates how to use a single Stamp instance as a background watermark that repeats on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-multi-line-colored-header-stamp.title: Apply Multi‑Line Colored Header Stamp to PDF
apply-multi-line-colored-header-stamp.description: Shows how to add several header lines with different font colors to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade.
